### createGlobalConfig()

创建一个全局配置

```typescript
createGlobalConfig: <Value>(name: string, defaultValue: Value) => {
    ConfigProvider: React.Provider<Value | undefined>;
    useConfig: (propValue?: Value) => Value;
    GlobalConfigProvider: ({ value }: {
        value: Value;
    }) => null;
    getGlobal: () => Value;
    setGlobal: (value: Value) => void;
}
```

#### createGlobalConfig的参数


<SiteTableHighlight columns="3" type="1" />

|  参数 | 类型 | 描述 |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  name | string |  |
|  defaultValue | Value |  |

<b>返回值:</b>

{ ConfigProvider: React.Provider&lt;Value \| undefined&gt;; useConfig: (propValue?: Value) =&gt; Value; GlobalConfigProvider: ({ value }: { value: Value; }) =&gt; null; getGlobal: () =&gt; Value; setGlobal: (value: Value) =&gt; void; }
